title: ASR Outdoor Deluxe 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box Gold Panning Backpack Kit
description:
The ASR Outdoor 24 Piece Deluxe Gold Panning Kit with Sluice Box was designed to give you the edge while panning for gold with portability in mind; inside the backpack, we've included our 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box. This lightweight, sluice box for gold panning incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50 inch run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a 5 gallon bucket as well as the included 30L canvas backpack making this ideal for beginner gold panning, day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers

ASR Outdoor Deluxe 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box Gold Panning Backpack Kit

The ASR Outdoor 24 Piece Deluxe Gold Panning Kit with Sluice Box was designed to give you the edge while panning for gold with portability in mind; inside the backpack, we've included our 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box. This lightweight, sluice box for gold panning incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50 inch run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a 5 gallon bucket as well as the included 30L canvas backpack making this ideal for beginner gold panning, day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding gold sluice box into remote areas anywhere!

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining operations with this sluice box backpack gold panning kit.

Key Features

  • BACKPACK GOLD PANNING KIT WITH SLUICE BOX: 24 total pieces; everything you need to strike it rich in one complete sluice box gold panning kit; process your gold rich paydirt anywhere you can get on the gold
  • EFFORTLESS USE: Gold mining equipment ready to deploy from your backpack. No assembly required. When extended in stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning
  • HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Best in quality components included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. For all experience levels of gold panning enthusiasts
  • GOLD SLUICE BOX: Highly durable, constructed from rust-free aluminum. Includes miners moss and gold carpet pre installed. Extended Dimensions: 50" Length; 9.25" Channel; 2.5" Side Wall; Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9.25" x 7" (LxWxH); 13.25" Flange
  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: 50" gold sluice box, gold panning backpack, folding pick axe shovel, 1/2" gold classifier screen, 10" and 12" dual riffle gold pans, 10” finishing gold pan, marking ribbon, magnifying tweezers, (2) gold snuffer bottles, (4) collection glass vials, (2) carabiner clips, (4) pipettes, (4) bedrock crevice picks

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROBGP
  • UPC: 810058485601
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 24pc Complete Backpack Kit, Black

With our top load canvas backpack you'll be able to carry as much equipment as you need. This 30L hiking day pack has room, even while filled with the sluice box to contain all your outdoor gear; featuring quick release buckles and a draw string closure to keep your things secure while at the same time making them readily accessible in the large central pouch. The two side pouches close securely by zipper and magnetic canvas flap snap.

The included gold mining equipment is ready to deploy from your backpack. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is position correctly in the field. When extended in the stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning.

Best in quality components are included in this complete backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. The gold panning equipment includes a 1/2 classifier screen, multiple gold pans and an assortment of gold recovery snuffer bottles and small collection vials for all experience levels of gold prospecting enthusiasts.
